_comment: Understudy per-install preferences. Copy to config.json (gitignored) and edit, or let the guided setup (SETUP.md) write it. Absent file = these defaults. Paths/secrets live in .env, not here.
_health_days: days a project can sit in your court before its status light turns: <move = green/active, <slip = amber/your-move, <stalled = orange/slipping, else red/stalled. These also drive the dashboard's 'Needs attention' filter (slipping + stalled).
